explanation: 家 combines a roof-like 宀 with a 豕-like lower form, traditionally connected with a pig inside a dwelling. For a modern learner, the clearest reading is visual and semantic: a house-shaped top over a domestic lower form.

glyph.title: 家
glyph.description: The character 家 is shown as two inspectable component groups: 宀 above and a 豕-like form below.

components.note: This top component contributes the idea of a dwelling or covered place.
The lower form is traditionally explained through 豕. Treat it as a useful historical and visual clue, not as a standalone modern meaning inside every use of 家.

related.label: roof family
related.note: Another common character built under 宀.

related.label: roof family
related.note: A room or chamber under the same visual top.

related.label: component
related.note: The lower component used in the traditional explanation.

related.label: component
related.note: The roof component that often points toward houses or covered spaces.
